title: serissa serissoides
intro: Serissa serissoides, also known as the Snow Rose or Tree of a Thousand Stars, is a flowering plant native to Sri Lanka and Southeast Asia, characterized by its small, white, star-shaped flowers and dark green, elliptical leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Serissa serissoides include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
